description: A metrology technician needs to manage the calibration schedule for torque wrenches used on the assembly line.

nodes.task_description: Run a report to identify all torque wrenches that are due for calibration in the next 30 days.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates a list of tools requiring calibration.

nodes.task_description: Issue a recall for the due tools from the assembly line.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent notifies the production supervisors to turn in the specified tools.

nodes.task_description: After a tool is calibrated, update its calibration record and return it to service.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent updates the tool's status to 'Calibrated' and logs the new calibration date.
